specFidelityNotes: Reviewed uncommitted working tree (0 commits on feature/issue-413-ui-surface-compositions; three-dot 8c707cc...HEAD empty) against GitHub issue #413, scope-alignment-issue-413.md, issue-context-cache AC, and Component design docs. All five surface-composition families ship as typed packages/ui exports: Card/InteractiveCard (+ preserved RecommendationCard/DestinationCard), Dialog/ConfirmDialog, Popover/UnavailableKpiPopover, Form (TextField/PasswordField/OtpField/FormSubmit composing Button), and Table (sortable headers, keyboard row nav, empty state, responsive data-label collapse composing Badge). Dialogs/popovers implement focus trap (overlay-utils), Escape dismissal, and outside-click/backdrop dismissal. Forms/tables are keyboard-navigable with labelled inputs; Vietnamese default copy; 44px touch targets and focus-visible rings documented in CSS tests. Import-boundary proof covers packages/ui and apps/demo. Deferred (not blocking): sheet/alert dialog sub-patterns and execution-workflow card composition per cards.md — RecommendationCard already covers Decision cards; workflow/screen-specific layouts remain later siblings per scope resolution.

Diff touches only #413-partitioned files; no toast/loading/chart/nav (#414) edits.
